title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/03/2025
Today, DCE Iron ore futures market fluctuated downward. The most-traded contract I2505 closed at 785.5, with a daily decline of 0.19%.Traders followed the market to sell goods. As the weekend approached and ore prices fell, steel mills were cautious and mainly observed, with poor purchase willingness.
